creator: allin
selection_criteria: Prioritized clips 60-2000s (1-33 min) over 4500s+ full episodes; selected for motion-graphics density (chyrons, headline cards, infographics, animated stats). Mix of interview clips, news segments, expert breakdowns, and explainer-style content.
